seeds.name: weekly-doc-drift
seeds.title: Weekly doc drift watch
seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-source-of-truth-check to audit top-level docs for authority drift, summary bloat, or conflicting guidance. Do not mutate by default. Then use $aoa-sanitized-share to produce a short shareable drift report with canonical file pointers and recommended bounded next steps.

seeds.name: guarded-infra-preview
seeds.title: Guarded infra preview
seeds.schedule_hint: manual or scheduled after config drift alerts
seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-approval-gate-check to classify whether the requested infrastructure action is approved as stated. If a preview path exists, use $aoa-dry-run-first and stop before mutation. Only if authority already exists and the task remains bounded, use $aoa-safe-infra-change to recommend the smallest next step. Always report rollback notes and residual risk.

seeds.name: local-stack-health-check
seeds.title: Local stack health check
seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-source-of-truth-check to locate the canonical startup and dependency docs, then use $aoa-local-stack-bringup to verify the smallest viable local stack on current HEAD. If blockers appear, stop at the bounded bring-up seam and use $aoa-sanitized-share to prepare a concise blocker report.

seeds.name: decision-brief
seeds.title: Decision brief after notable changes
seeds.schedule_hint: after a set of notable merges
seeds.prompt: Use $aoa-adr-write to capture any meaningful architectural or workflow decisions implied by recent merged work. Then use $aoa-sanitized-share to produce a brief shareable note that preserves rationale and tradeoffs without leaking internal detail.
